expectations.text: Inspects the model via idfa-ops to discover all Named Ranges and their formulas
expectations.evidence: Report header: 'Total Named Ranges: 24 (6 inputs, 18 calculations)'. Quick Reference table lists all 24 Named Ranges with formulas. The model was inspected to extract this data.

expectations.text: Produces a Logic Map listing every Named Range with its business rule in plain English
expectations.evidence: Each block (Revenue, COGS Percentage, COGS Dollar, Gross Profit, OpEx, EBITDA) has a table with columns 'Named Range', 'Formula', 'Business Rule in Plain English'. All 18 calculation ranges are listed.

expectations.text: Shows the dependency chain — which inputs feed which calculations
expectations.evidence: Each block includes a 'Dependency chain' showing arrows: 'Revenue_Y1 <-- Inp_Rev_Y1', 'Revenue_Y2 <-- Revenue_Y1, Inp_Rev_Growth'. Complete Dependency Graph section shows full flow from inputs to EBITDA.

expectations.text: Groups the map by layer (Assumptions → Calculations → Output)
expectations.evidence: Organized as 'Layer 1 — Assumptions (Inputs)' then 'Layer 2 — Calculations (Business Rules)' with subsections for each block. States 'Layer 3 — Output: Presentation and formatting. Reads from Layer 2 only.'

expectations.text: Each formula description is understandable without Excel knowledge (e.g., 'Year 2 Revenue = Year 1 Revenue grown by the annual growth rate')
expectations.evidence: Examples: 'Year 2 Revenue equals Year 1 Revenue grown by the annual growth rate', 'Year 1 COGS in dollars = Year 1 Revenue times Year 1 COGS %', 'Year 1 EBITDA = Year 1 Gross Profit minus Year 1 Operating Expenses.'

expectations.text: Does NOT include cell coordinate references in the Logic Map — only Named Range names
expectations.evidence: All formulas reference Named Ranges only: '=Revenue_Y1*(1+Inp_Rev_Growth)', '=COGS_Pct_Y1-Inp_COGS_Efficiency'. Zero cell coordinates (A1, B2, etc.) appear in the Logic Map body.
